title: Na`arah #5292
definition:
Naarah or Naarath = "maiden"

 n pr f
 1) the 2nd wife of Ashur of the tribe of Judah

 n pr loc
 2) one of the landmarks on the southern boundary of the territory of
    Ephraim
nasbUsage:
Definition: Naarah or Naarath = "maiden"

 n pr f
 1) the 2nd wife of Ashur of the tribe of Judah

 n pr loc
 2) one of the landmarks on the southern boundary of the territory of
    Ephraim

    NASB:  an Isr. woman, also a place on the border of Ephraim
